title: New locations arise for Russian Urals STS activity
section_path: New locations arise for Russian Urals STS activity
section_path_text: New locations arise for Russian Urals STS activity
summary:
We explore the latest trends and shifts in Urals STS locations, their relevance and the profile of tankers involved. By Armen Azizian
As we approach the six-month mark of the EU-ban on Russian crude imports, we are seeing an increase in ship-to-ship transfers (STS) of Russian Urals in previously obscure locations. The Atlantic Ocean is emerging as a hub for STS transfers of Russian Urals, accounting for 90kbd in May (days 1-25), 44% of all transfers.
